name: retrieval-dataset-biosample
description: Runs NCBI BioSample search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.

sources.label: NCBI BioSample
sources.description: Sample metadata via NCBI E-utilities and Datasets BioSample report APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum BioSample records to request from ESearch.

interface.shortDescription: NCBI BioSample as a local retrieval plugin
interface.longDescription: Runs NCBI BioSample search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.
defaultPrompt: Search BioSample for human liver samples.
Fetch a SAMN accession through the BioSample plugin.
